title: Ryanair to Invest £40 Million in Prestwick Airport

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Ryanair has revealed a significant investment of £40 million into Prestwick Airport. This investment is anticipated to create approximately 450 new jobs at the facility. Specific details regarding how the funds will be allocated have not been disclosed, but the expansion is expected to enhance the airport's operations.

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: The infusion of capital by Ryanair at Prestwick Airport is expected to bolster local employment and economic activity. It highlights the airline's commitment to growing its presence in the region, which may have a positive impact on the broader aviation sector and the local community.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Ryanair announces £40m expansion at Prestwick Airport creating 450 jobs
